title: Security hooks: git pre-push gate + agent (.claude) input/output guard

AC1.note: init installs a managed pre-push block (confirm prompt, --yes default, --no-security-hook opt-out); coexists with testing pre-push + user content (tested); managed # gd-metapro:security-pre-push block.

AC2.note: pre-push blocks (non-zero) only in enforced/ci; advisory warns+allows; each block propagates exit via || exit $?; probes security support and skips on version skew; no-op when disabled.

AC3.note: init installs .claude/settings.json (confirm, --no-security-agent-hook): UserPromptSubmit→check-input, PreToolUse(Write|Edit)→check-output; valid Claude Code schema.

AC4.note: merge-safe + idempotent installer (sentinel security-agent-hooks); preserves user keys/hooks (tested empty+pre-populated); re-install no dupes; disable removes only managed entries (init+update reconcile, tested); valid JSON.

AC5.note: both hooks in manifest security.hooks; offered only when security enabled; update refreshes (no data/security touch); documented in modules/security.md; standard validate PASS.

AC6.note: 10+ tests: pre-push managed-block+coexistence+no-op+flag+exit-code execution; agent merge-safe empty/pre-populated+idempotent+flag+disable-removal; 142 pre-existing unchanged; bun run check green (159 pass).

AC7.note: docs: security spec/README/agent-protocol (hooks), roadmap, docs/docs cli-reference/modules/workspace-and-lifecycle (flags+behavior); advisory default; no drift.

tasks.title: Add/adjust tests and make them pass
Docs: security spec/README/agent-protocol, roadmap, docs/docs hooks+flags
